{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Bleeding Phoenix eggs
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The eggs of the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] are round crimson shapes that cling to landscapes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Bleeding Phoenix eggs]] can re-form if broken apart.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
